title: lippia krenakiana
intro: Lippia krenakiana, also known as "erva limão", is a plant species native to Brazil, belonging to the Verbenaceae family. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Lippia krenakiana include its potential to alleviate symptoms of colds, coughs, and respiratory issues, as well as its ability to reduce inflammation and improve digestion. Lippia krenakiana can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or syrup, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions.
